title: Nether's Lost Ashes
description: This is the first mod I've made, so don't expect it to be perfect, and I can't promise any updates. It adds Scorched Obsidian tools ( Sword only rn ) and armor, mostly focused on surviving in the Nether.
body:
Nether's Lost Ashes is the first mod I've ever made, so it's pretty simple and might not be perfect. It adds Scorched Obsidian tools and armor, which are great for surviving in the Nether. The armor gives you permanent fire resistance, and there are extra buffs when you're in the Nether, Speed only right now but there might be added more later.

I don’t know if I’ll update this mod in the future, but I hope you enjoy it for what it is!
